introSection: 3 Loop Coaster is a steel spinning kiddie roller coaster located at Central Park in Tashkent, Uzbekistan. It opened in 2018 with the refurbished Central Park.
fullText:
3 Loop Coaster is a steel spinning kiddie roller coaster located at Central Park in Tashkent, Uzbekistan. It opened in 2018 with the refurbished Central Park.



Riders sit facing back-to-back.
